# FirmFlow

> FirmFlow is an all-in-one practice management platform for accountants, lawyers, consultants and bookkeepers. It replaces DocuSign, ShareFile, Clio, and similar tools with one integrated platform from €29/month flat — no per-user fees.

FirmFlow combines documents, e-signatures, time tracking, invoicing, a client portal, and an AI assistant into a single platform. It is built for UK and EU professional services firms who want to consolidate their tool stack, reduce monthly software costs, and offer clients a branded digital experience.

Key facts:
- Pricing: Starter €29/month (up to 5 team members), Pro €89/month (unlimited team)
- No per-user fees, no contracts, 14-day free trial
- GDPR compliant, EU-hosted, AES-256 encrypted, eIDAS certified e-signatures
- Multi-currency (10 currencies), multi-language (EN, NL, DE, FR, ES)
- Built for firms in the UK, Netherlands, Germany, and wider EU

## Product

- [How it works](https://www.firmflow.io/how-it-works): Complete feature walkthrough — dashboard, engagements, documents, signatures, time tracking, invoicing, client portal, and AI assistant
- [Pricing](https://www.firmflow.io/pricing): Starter €29/month, Pro €89/month, flat pricing with no per-user fees
- [Book a demo](https://www.firmflow.io/demo): 15-minute personalised walkthrough
- [Start free trial](https://www.firmflow.io/signup): 14-day free trial, no credit card required

## Who it is for

- [Accounting firms](https://www.firmflow.io/for-accountants): Tax, audit, bookkeeping workflows
- [Law firms](https://www.firmflow.io/for-lawyers): Contracts, case-based time tracking, client portal
- [Consulting firms](https://www.firmflow.io/for-consultants): Proposals, project tracking, retainers
- [Bookkeepers](https://www.firmflow.io/for-bookkeepers): Works alongside Xero and QuickBooks Online

## Comparisons

- [FirmFlow vs TaxDome](https://www.firmflow.io/vs-taxdome): Feature comparison for accounting firms
- [FirmFlow vs Karbon](https://www.firmflow.io/vs-karbon): Feature comparison for practice management
- [FirmFlow vs Clio](https://www.firmflow.io/vs-clio): Feature comparison for law firms
- [DocuSign alternative](https://www.firmflow.io/docusign-alternative): Unlimited e-signatures included
- [ShareFile alternative](https://www.firmflow.io/sharefile-alternative): Secure document sharing included
